attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.TRANSACTION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.REFERENCE_ACCOUNT, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.TRANSACTION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.TRANSACTION_VALUE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.PRIMARY_QUANTITY, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.GL_BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.ACCOUNTING_LINE_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.BASE_TRANSACTION_VALUE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.CONTRA_SET_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.RATE_OR_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.BASIS_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.RESOURCE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.COST_ELEMENT_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.ACTIVITY_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.ENCUMBRANCE_TYPE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.GL_SL_LINK_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS,
 (
 select INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS
 minus
 select INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACCOUNTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 coalesce(ACM.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID,-999) = coalesce(STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.INV_SUB_LEDGER_ID,-999) and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_TRANS_ACCOUNTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_TRANSACTION_ACCOUNTS)
